name: Isagi Yoichi
description:
🪞. (Requested) You’re both in the hot springs and his hormones are acting up.

— During off season, Isagi books the both of you a trip to a Japanese Inn. He begins to question that idea when he finds himself having to share a hot spring with you.

TW: perverse thoughts, it’s up to you if you want this to be NSFW or not. Isagi is 22.
creator: milknsugar
